steps.title: Set up the weight equation and constraint
steps.content: The calf starts at 5,900 pounds and gains 250 pounds per day. After $n$ days, its weight is: $$5,900 + 250n$$ We need: $$8,650 < 5,900 + 250n < 9,650$$

steps.title: Solve the compound inequality
steps.content: Subtract 5,900 from all parts: $$2,750 < 250n < 3,750$$ Divide by 250: $$11 < n < 15$$

steps.title: Identify a valid integer value
steps.content: Since $n$ must be an integer with $11 < n < 15$, the possible values are 12, 13, and 14. Verify with $n = 12$: weight $= 5,900 + 250(12) = 8,900$. Since $8,650 < 8,900 < 9,650$, the answer is 12.
